blockedAssertions.blockedBy: `BatchingIntegrationTests.testSingleRequestFlowUnchanged` was skipped under SwiftPM because the MLX Metal library is unavailable in SPM debug builds, and xcodebuild runtime execution was blocked by disk-space exhaustion.

appliedUpdates.description: Added example-app concurrency guidance and a dedicated llm-tool-cli flow-validator section for the examples repo user surface.
Documented retrying swift build/swift test with a validator-owned TMPDIR when the default temp area hits errno=28 / No space left on device.
